summary: Completed testing of LEARN pillar integration and NPS testimonials feature. Fixed critical bug in ProductCard.jsx where 'isOpen' was undefined causing product modals to crash. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Learn page fully functional with hero section, training types, programs, trainers, products, and bundles.

minor.issue: Returns all programs instead of filtering by is_featured flag when using sample data

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: isOpen is not defined - caused product modals to crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed isOpen dependency from useEffect for fetching NPS testimonials since modal is always open when component renders

seed_data_creation: None required - APIs return sample data when DB is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEARN pillar is fully integrated. ProductCard modal bug has been fixed. NPS testimonials section will only appear when there are approved testimonials (score 9-10 with allow_publish=true).

learn_page_loads.description: Learn page loads at /learn with all sections
learn_page_loads.evidence: Screenshot shows hero section, training types, programs, trainers, products

learn_in_navbar.description: Learn pillar appears in navbar 'More' dropdown
learn_in_navbar.evidence: Screenshot shows Learn option in More dropdown with correct icon and description

learn_programs_api.evidence: API returns programs with id, name, price, duration, sessions

learn_trainers_api.evidence: API returns trainers with id, name, rating, specializations

learn_bundles_api.evidence: API returns bundles with price, original_price, savings

training_request_form.description: Training request form works when logged in
training_request_form.evidence: Modal shows pet selection, training type, goals, behavior issues, location preference

nps_testimonials_api.evidence: API returns {testimonials: [], count: 0} - no surveys completed yet

product_modal_nps_section.description: Product modal shows NPS testimonials section when testimonials exist
product_modal_nps_section.evidence: Code review confirms section renders conditionally based on testimonials.length > 0

communication_preferences.description: Communication Preferences in Member Dashboard Settings tab
communication_preferences.evidence: Screenshot shows Communication Channels (Email, WhatsApp, SMS) and Notification Preferences
